summary: Dinoprostone is primarily indicated for cervical ripening during pregnancy and labor initiation, not for managing postpartum hemorrhage. In contrast, oxytocin, misoprostol, and carboprost/prostacyclin analogues such as PGE₂-Fα are all recognized frontline agents per global health organizations' recommendations for controlling bleeding after childbirth.

In contrast, oxytocin, misoprostol, and carboprost/prostacyclin analogues such as PGE₂-Fα are all recognized frontline agents per global health organizations' recommendations for controlling bleeding after childbirth.. Answer choice: B
